core.title: Joomla to PHP/JSON: Live Site Conversion

content.summary: Step-by-step Joomla to PHP/JSON flat-file conversion. Content export, URL mapping, schema migration, and the first deploy.
content.description: Walking through the complete process of pulling a Joomla site apart and rebuilding it as a PHP/JSON flat-file property. The session covers content export and schema design, URL structure decisions, .htaccess routing, JSON data modeling, and the GitHub Actions deployment pipeline.

seo.meta_title: Joomla to PHP/JSON: Live Site Conversion | Website Rebuilds | AI Now Guide
seo.meta_description: Step-by-step live session: Joomla to PHP/JSON flat-file conversion covering content export, URL mapping, schema migration, and deployment.
